text: Hey, I wanted to check in with you. I've noticed you've been pushing pretty hard lately, and I just want to remind you that rest isn't lazy or unproductive—it's essential. Your body and mind need time to recharge, and honestly, you'll be so much better at everything you care about when you're not running on empty. Please take some time this week to slow down, whether that's a quiet evening, a full day off, or just some moments to breathe. You deserve to feel restored. I care about you, and I want you to take care of yourself too.
